view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for shape-invariant enforcement is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates that the offer component 'Instructor' was created with the selector set to `resource_type=host`, which aligns with the requirement for shape-invariant enforcement. The evidence from the prior steps confirms that the necessary components and configurations were established to meet this requirement. Specifically, the linked use case and the evidence from the step 'owner-create-offer' support the conclusion that only the correct selector payload is present.
